name: Empress Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 2 Green Onions and Tops, cut into thin slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the chicken wings from their tips (or save for stock).
2. Combine soy sauce, sherry, minced ginger and garlic in a large bowl; stir in chicken.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove the chicken and reserve the marinade.
5. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
6. Lightly coat the chicken pieces with cornstarch; add to skillet and brown slowly on all sides.
7. Remove the chicken; drain off fat.
8. Stir water and reserved marinade into the same skillet.
9. Add chicken; sprinkle green onions and slivered ginger evenly over chicken.
10. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes, or until chicken is tender.
